SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice
            FROM customer c
            JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey

            ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC
            LIMIT 100

SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, n.n_name, r.r_name
            FROM supplier s
            JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
            JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
            WHERE r.r_name IN ('ASIA', 'EUROPE')
            ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC
            LIMIT 100

            FROM part p
            JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
            JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

            ORDER BY ps.ps_supplycost DESC

SELECT *
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    o_orderkey,
                    o_custkey,
                    o_totalprice,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o_custkey ORDER BY o_totalprice DESC) AS rn
                FROM orders
            ) ranked
            WHERE rn <= 3
            LIMIT 200

SELECT *
                FROM (
                    SELECT
                        l_partkey,
                        l_shipdate,
                        l_extendedprice,
                        AVG(l_extendedprice) OVER (
                            PARTITION BY l_partkey
                            ORDER BY l_shipdate
                            ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
                        ) AS moving_avg_price
                    FROM lineitem
                    WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM l_shipdate) = 1
                ) t
                LIMIT 120

SELECT *

SELECT *
